subject: Gaming
title: Toru Iwatani: Creator of Pac-Man
description: A quick win: understand Toru Iwatani: Creator of Pac-Man.

hook.text: Toru Iwatani wanted to make a game that anyone could enjoy—even people who hated video games.

buildup.text: He studied what women disliked about arcades: violence, complexity, and dark themes.

discovery.text: A pizza missing one slice inspired the character. The maze design came from Japanese folk stories.

twist.text: Namco gave Iwatani almost no recognition. He received no royalties and stayed a regular employee.

climax.text: Pac-Man earned billions while its creator earned a standard salary. He later became a university professor.

punchline.text: He made billions for Namco. They gave him a regular paycheck.

quiz.question: What inspired the shape of Pac-Man?
options: A pizza with one slice missing
